features.name: always_comb with for loop and conditional self-assignment
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block containing a for loop where a variable is assigned conditionally based on its own previous value using a ternary operator

features.name: variable bit slice in conditional assignment
features.description: Code should include a variable used as a bit slice range in a conditional assignment within a loop, where the slice index controls the assignment
features.snippet:
row_idx = !row_found ? x[1:0] : row_idx;
row_found = !row_found ? wide_din[x] : row_found;

features.name: register assignment with indexed array access in always_comb loop
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block with a for loop that performs indexed array access and conditional register assignment, where the loop index is used to both slice bits and index into an array
